description: Final verification pass: run typecheck, lint, test, and build to confirm zero errors across the entire stack. Fix any remaining issues introduced by FEAT-001 through FEAT-004. Ensure cross-layer contract consistency between backend registry, API routes, translation layer, frontend UI, and test utilities.
steps: 1. Run npm run typecheck and fix any type errors.
2. Run npm run lint and fix any lint errors or warnings.
3. Run npm run test and fix any test failures.
4. Run npm run build and fix any build errors.

5. Verify cross-layer consistency: (a) Every provider in AI_PROVIDERS has a corresponding entry in PROVIDER_MODELS or is passthrough, (b) Every OpenCode variant in AI_PROVIDERS has a corresponding executor in open-sse/executors/index.ts, (c) Every provider with a specialized executor also has an entry in open-sse/config/providers.ts, (d) The test-batch route recognizes all auth groups including the new providers.

6. Add tests/unit/provider-ecosystem-consistency.test.ts that programmatically validates: (a) all AI_PROVIDERS keys have matching providerModels entries or passthroughModels=true, (b) all executor keys match known provider IDs, (c) no duplicate aliases exist across provider categories.
acceptance_criteria: npm run typecheck exits with code 0
npm run lint exits with code 0
npm run test exits with code 0 (all tests pass)
npm run build exits with code 0
No provider exists in AI_PROVIDERS without either a PROVIDER_MODELS entry or passthroughModels=true flag
findings: All 4 verification commands pass cleanly (typecheck, lint, test, build). Tests: 196 files, 1140 tests passing (6 new from ecosystem consistency test). Build completes in ~14s with Turbopack. No fixes were needed - FEAT-001 through FEAT-004 left the codebase fully clean.
